description: Legal query about a man who admit he recieved a loan but claimed he already returned it with few people one of them named Halfon. The lander claimed he only recieved small part from the loan, and Halfon claimed he doesn't remember recieving any money from borrower. Published by Glick שרידי תשובות מחכמי האימפריה העות'מאנית pp. 489-491
description_he: שאלה משפטית בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
